summary: Phase 50 testing: Assigned Components Functional Behavior. Verified implementation via code review and backend API tests. All 7 backend tests passed. Frontend code correctly implements hide/readOnly logic for unassigned fields.
critical_code_review_comments: PackagePublicView.js: loadFieldPlacements correctly annotates __isAssigned based on assigned_components map (lines 207-251)
PackagePublicView.js: getFieldsForDoc applies correct visibility logic - assigned=interactive, unassigned+value=readOnly, unassigned+noValue=hidden (lines 258-270)
PackagePublicView.js: Document header X/Y fields counter excludes field_hidden and readOnly fields (lines 809-843)
InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: Correctly filters out field_hidden fields from rendering (line 717)
InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: handleFieldChange skips field_hidden and readOnly fields for field linking (lines 138-140)
useGuidedFillIn.js: requiredFields filter excludes field_hidden and readOnly fields (lines 127-131)
PublicDocumentViewEnhanced.js: Standalone doc view applies same hide/readOnly semantics (lines 1146-1169)
Backend sign-with-fields: Correctly filters fields based on assigned_components and embeds only relevant fields (lines 545-564)

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - no active packages available for live UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 50 assigned_components implementation verified via code review. All packages in test environment are voided/completed, so live UI testing of package signing flow was not possible. Backend API tests confirm endpoints work correctly. Code review confirms frontend logic is correct for: (1) field visibility based on assignment, (2) readOnly for unassigned fields with values, (3) hidden for unassigned fields without values, (4) backward compat when no assigned_components, (5) field counter excludes hidden/readOnly fields, (6) Complete Signing button enabled based on assigned fields only.

code_review_verification.loadFieldPlacements_annotation: PASS - Correctly annotates __isAssigned based on assigned_components map
code_review_verification.getFieldsForDoc_visibility: PASS - Applies correct hide/readOnly logic based on assignment + value
code_review_verification.document_header_counter: PASS - Excludes field_hidden and readOnly from X/Y count
code_review_verification.useGuidedFillIn_filter: PASS - Excludes field_hidden and readOnly from required fields
code_review_verification.PublicDocumentViewEnhanced_semantics: PASS - Same hide/readOnly logic for standalone docs
code_review_verification.backend_sign_with_fields: PASS - Filters fields based on assigned_components

backward_compatibility.no_assigned_components: PASS (code verified) - All fields visible when no assignment data
backward_compatibility.template_level_assignments: PASS (code verified) - Falls back to assigned_to/recipient_id check

phase_50_test_results.ui_testing_limitation: No active (in_progress) packages available in test environment - all packages are voided or completed
